NEXT-014.note: Kysense Body HA is a body SKU under the Kysense main HA filler family.

NEXT-016.note: NOVAPlus Nozzle is an accessory/nozzle kit for the NOVAPlus injector.

NEXT-017.note: Use this row as the canonical Vanquish ME line and fold regional wording into it.

NEXT-018.note: Non-Contact Selective RF is another description of BTL Vanquish ME.

NEXT-024.note: Use this row as the canonical BTL Unison line.

NEXT-034.note: MicroGlide is a topical glide/adjunct product for Eclipse microneedling devices, not an injectable filler line.

exclude_decisions.NEXT-021: Universal IPS surgical implants are generic orthopedic/dental/surgical implant scope, not aesthetic-dedicated upstream products.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-029: Daejoo Medical Cosmetics ODM is broad ODM/service capability without a concrete independent terminal product line.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-030: Dongbang acupuncture needles are TCM/rehabilitation consumables, not aesthetic microneedling products.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-031: Doum fat transfer cannulas are hard surgical/liposuction instruments outside the current light-aesthetic upstream scope.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-032: Doum infiltration pump is general liposuction surgery hardware outside the current scope.
exclude_decisions.NEXT-033: Doum PAL liposuction system is large surgical hardware outside the current scope.
